summary: Produced android-fabrication-decisions.json with 51 rows covering all Android drift refs after extractor v1.2. Cross-platform checked against all 4 surfaces.

changes.description: Created. 51 rows. Classifications: NAME_DRIFT_ANDROID_RENAMED (13), TRUE_FABRICATION_NOWHERE (37), ANDROID_GAP_OTHER_PLATFORMS_HAVE (1). ANDROID_EXTRACTOR_BLIND_SPOT: 0 (v1.2 extractor is clean).

validators_passed: all rows have surface_evidence with 4 platforms
all rows have classification and recommended_action
notes: NAME_DRIFT_ANDROID_RENAMED (13 refs, 26 occurrences): All are wrong case or wrong method name. Key drifts: AmityCommentRepository.get→getComment (×5), AmityRoomRepository.getBroadcastData→getBroadcasterData (×3), AmityRoomRepository.stop→stopRoom (×3), AmityContentFlagReason.OTHERS→Others + 5 other UPPER_SNAKE→PascalCase flag reason names, AmityError.NOT_FOUND→ITEM_NOT_FOUND. ANDROID_GAP_OTHER_PLATFORMS_HAVE (1 ref): AmityRoomStatus found on iOS — signal for Android SDK team. TRUE_FABRICATION_NOWHERE (37 refs): includes AmityException.PermissionDenied/NotFound/InvalidParameter (fabricated nested exception classes), Builder patterns (AmityPostRepository.Builder, AmityFileRepository.Builder, AmityStream.StreamBuilder, AmityPoll.PollCreateBuilder, AmityPost.PostCreateBuilder), AmityPinnedPost.post, AmityStream.Builder, AmityVideoPlayer.Builder, AmityStreamBroadcasterClient.isSetup, AmityCoreClient.Configuration, Environment.DIRECTORY_DOWNLOADS, AmitySDK, AmityChatFragment, AmityManageProductTagListComponent, AmitySessionManager, AmityError.ALREADY_DELETED, AmityStreamBroadcasterConfig, AmityRoomStatus (×1, vs iOS gap), and many AmityException.XxxException nested types.
